title: Daily Memo: Update on Iran Strikes, US Access to British Bases
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
More targets. The U.S. carried out overnight airstrikes on military targets on Iran’s Kharg Island, the main hub for Iranian oil exports. The strikes hit military bunkers and storage facilities, air defense systems and other military installations but did not target oil infrastructure. The United States and Israel also launched an attack on a bridge […]

The post Daily Memo: Update on Iran Strikes, US Access to British Bases appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
More targets. The U.S. carried out overnight airstrikes on military targets on Iran’s Kharg Island, the main hub for Iranian oil exports. The strikes hit military bunkers and storage facilities, air defense systems and other military installations but did not target oil infrastructure. The United States and Israel also launched an attack on a bridge […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
